name: better-sqlite3
description: Shim that re-exports better-sqlite3-multiple-ciphers so drizzle-orm can resolve the canonical package name. Psygil uses the SQLCipher fork (better-sqlite3-multiple-ciphers) for AES-256 encryption, but drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3 hard-requires the literal package name 'better-sqlite3' at runtime.
